name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met during freshman year at Dhaka University. We used to explore the city together on weekends.

bio: My colleague at the office and weekend cricket partner. Always motivates me to stay active.

bio: Childhood best friend from school. We still share our deepest secrets and laugh about old memories.

bio: Gym buddy who pushes me to be better every day. We motivate each other to stay consistent.

bio: My neighbor and food exploration partner. We try new restaurants in Dhaka every month.

bio: University friend and coding partner. We often discuss new tech trends and build small projects.

bio: My cousin who feels more like a sister. We share family stories and support each other.

bio: Travel buddy from our trip to Cox's Bazar. Always planning the next adventure together.
